stratagems.name: Veterans of the Long War
stratagems.phase: Your Shooting Phase or Your Fight Phase
stratagems.when: When you select a Heretic Astartes Infantry or Mounted unit to shoot or fight.
stratagems.target: One Heretic Astartes Infantry or Mounted unit.
stratagems.effect: That unit gains +1 to wound with all its attacks for the rest of the phase.

stratagems.name: Endless Hatred
stratagems.when: When a Heretic Astartes unit is selected as the target of an attack.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, improve that unit’s armour save against the attack by 1.
stratagems.restrictions: Cannot be used on units with a 2+ save already benefiting from cover.

stratagems.name: Relentless Advance
stratagems.when: When a Heretic Astartes Infantry unit makes a Normal Move.
stratagems.effect: That unit can Advance and still shoot later this turn, but counts as having Remained Stationary.
stratagems.restrictions: Does not allow Heavy weapons to ignore the -1 to hit from Advancing unless they already have that rule.

stratagems.name: Unyielding Malice
stratagems.when: When an enemy unit destroys a model in a Heretic Astartes unit.
stratagems.target: The Heretic Astartes unit that lost a model.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in that unit is destroyed, roll one D6; on a 4+, the attacking unit suffers 1 mortal wound (max 6).

stratagems.name: Dark Reprisals
stratagems.when: When an enemy unit finishes a charge move within Engagement Range of a Heretic Astartes unit.
stratagems.effect: That unit fights first this phase.
stratagems.restrictions: Cannot be used on units that already have Fights First.

stratagems.name: Legacy of Vengeance
stratagems.when: When you select a Heretic Astartes unit to receive orders or buffs.
stratagems.effect: Until the start of your next Command phase, that unit re-rolls one hit roll and one wound roll each time it shoots or fights.
stratagems.restrictions: Cannot be stacked with abilities that grant full hit or wound re-rolls.
